dsl_rule.translation_notes: Ascending triangle is a bearish reversal/continuation pattern with flat base and rising tops. Entry conditions detect the pattern structure: price at pivot (flat support level) combined with rising highs. Exit uses 20-SMA crossover as a reasonable reversal condition since author provided no specific exit guidance (AUTHOR_SILENT). Stop loss set to 5% based on the 8% failure rate within 5% move. Average decline metric was unavailable (AUTHOR_SILENT) so conservative 5% stop used. Pattern breakout occurs upward but signal trades short on pattern completion, betting on the bearish 51% success rate.

source_rule_text: Ascending triangle: A bearish formation with flat base and upsloping top trendline; minor highs rise over time
